zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William d'Isney IV於1313年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾頓 迪士尼時，他的父親Sir William d'Isney III38歲，母親Joan Langford23歲。他於1373年與Mary de Grey在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Isney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name with fused French preposition d(e), for someone from Isigny in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Isinius (a Latinized form of Gaulish Isina) + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William d'Isney IV was born in 1313, in Norton Disney, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir William d'Isney III, was 38 and his mother, Joan Langford, was 23. He married Mary de Grey in 1373, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 87.

Il a épousé Mary de Grey en 1373, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William d'Isney IV(이)가 1313년 영국 링코실르 노르턴 디스니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William d'Isney III(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Langford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Mary de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Grey в 1373 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.
